[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0100010 2
1 0101010 3
2 0000111 3
3 1011000 3
4 1101111 6
5 0011010 3
6 1010110 4
7 1111010 5

01 10 0001010 2
12 21 0010010 2
23 32 1010010 3
34 43 0110010 3
45 54 0100010 2 match 0
56 65 0000010 1
67 76 0000000 a
70 07 1001000 2

02 20 1000110 3
13 31 0011010 3 match 5
24 42 0010010 2
35 53 0101010 3 match 1
46 64 0000010 1
57 75 0001000 1
60 06 0000111 3 match 2
71 17 0011000 2

47 74 0010000 1
50 05 0101010 3 match 1
61 16 0000010 1
72 27 1010000 2

15 51 0001010 2
26 62 0000110 2
37 73 1011000 3 match 3
